text: I find myself enveloped by an atmosphere of contrast—one space exudes a sterile, almost untouched neutrality, while the next pulses with the vibrant energy of creativity and innovation. The emptiness of the first room inspires reflection and anticipation, while the colorful, information-rich wall before me in the second scene awakens my curiosity and excitement for possibility. In such an environment, I feel poised between thought and action, at the threshold of discovery.
